title: Blooms Night Market at Ponce (BeltLine)
location: Ponce City Market, 675 Ponce de Leon Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Monthly night market on the BeltLine at PCM: local makers, art, food, and live music under the string lights. Easy, walkable, low-pressure date — browse, snack, grab a drink on the rooftop afterward.

title: Art of the Game — Opening Reception
location: Gallery Chimera, 624 N Highland Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: World Cup-timed group exhibition featuring international artists exploring soccer, culture, and connection. Meet the artists, browse mixed-media works, and enjoy an intimate opening-night reception in Poncey-Highland.

title: Tropical Elegance Latin Night — Salsa & Bachata Lesson + Dancing
time: 8:00 PM - 2:00 AM (lesson 8-10 PM, social 10 PM-2 AM)
location: Brimstone Restaurant & Tavern, 10595 Old Alabama Rd Connector, Alpharetta, GA
description: Beginner-friendly salsa and bachata lesson followed by a full Latin dance social. No experience needed — perfect excuse to hold each other close and learn a new skill together. Runs every Saturday.

title: Atlanta International Night Market: Taste the World on the BeltLine
location: 929 Lee St SW, Atlanta, GA (Westside BeltLine)
description: Travel the world on the BeltLine in one evening. Global street food, music, and a vibrant crowd. Ideal foodie date — split small plates, share a coconut, stay for sunset.

title: High Notes ATL — Rosé Weeknd (Fine Wine Series)
location: Rose and Rye, Atlanta, GA
description: Rooftop rosé tasting with live music and curated wine flights. Built for couples — lounge, sip, vibe. Easy Saturday-afternoon-into-evening date.

title: Love Lust Language — Live Music & Poetry Show
location: 393 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Intimate live music + poetry experience — interactive, sensual, and built around connection. A 'lean into each other' kind of date.

title: Love and Music Atlanta — Romantic Piano Concert
location: Rehearse Live, LLC, Atlanta, GA
description: Cocktail hour followed by an immersive romantic piano concert. Date-night-in-a-box: dress up, slow dance in the dark, hold hands through the music.

title: Lil Jon Live at the Fox Theatre
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Atlanta's own Lil Jon brings crunk-energy to the iconic Fox. Bring earplugs, your loudest outfit, and a partner who knows every 'yeah!' from 'Get Low.' High-energy Sunday night.

title: Jazz at The Strand: The Music of Sarah Vaughan
location: Earl and Rachel Smith Strand Theatre, Marietta, GA
description: Tribute to the legendary Sarah Vaughan in an intimate historic theatre just outside Atlanta. Classic date move — cocktails downtown Marietta, then a vocal-jazz master class.

title: Delvon Lamarr Organ Trio at Terminal West
location: Terminal West, 887 Howell Mill Rd NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Soul-soaked jazz-funk from the Seattle trio. Easy Monday-night date: dinner in West Midtown, then groove under the Terminal West rafters.

title: Comedy Bang! Bang! — Ground Beefing Tour 2026 (Scott Aukerman)
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd, Atlanta, GA
description: Scott Aukerman's podcast goes live — improv, characters, and bits with surprise guests. Perfect for couples who quote comedy inside jokes.

title: Rhys Darby at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3073 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA
description: The Flight of the Conchords' energy and Murray-from-Rick-and-Morty charm. A weird, warm, and wildly funny date — especially if you bonded over those shows.

title: Culture, Corks & Cuisine: Wine & Wings Edition
location: Midtown Atlanta (exact venue via ticket)
description: Wine + wings pairing night — equal parts elevated and casual. Built for couples who like tasting menus without the white-tablecloth stuffiness.

title: Amapiano Nights ATL — Mr Jazzi Q
location: District Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: South African Amapiano takes over District Atlanta with Mr Jazzi Q headlining + Atlanta's King of Amapiano. The sound is hypnotic, deep, and incredibly danceable. Late-night date for couples who want to be the last ones on the floor.

title: Culture Fest Day Party — Juneteenth Celebration
location: Cafe Circa Restaurant & Lounge, Atlanta, GA
description: Day party with Caribbean food, drinks, and music celebrating Juneteenth. Festive, photo-ready, and a great bridge between afternoon and evening plans.

title: Sip & Savor — Wine & Charcuterie Tasting Experience
location: Koncept House Capitol View, 631 Dill Ave SW, Atlanta, GA
description: Curated wine and charcuterie tasting in a stylish SW ATL venue. Classic, romantic, and slow-paced — built for conversation.

title: Reggae on the Rooftop Festival — Juneteenth Weekend
location: Air Roofrop (formerly Suite Lounge), 75 Luckie St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Second annual rooftop reggae/dancehall/soca/Afrobeats festival with skyline views, complimentary jerk chicken and rum punch (while supplies last), DJs, indoor + outdoor two-level setup. 6 hours of Caribbean vibes — peak date energy.

title: Juneteenth Atlanta Parade & Music Festival 2026
time: All day (festival runs Jun 19-21, parade Jun 20 at 10 AM)
location: Piedmont Park, Atlanta, GA
description: 14th annual Juneteenth Atlanta — three days of music, parade, vendors, food, art, family programming. Bring a blanket, walk the BeltLine to the park, share a plate from a Black-owned vendor. Culture-rich date that gives back to the city.

title: Happy People Atlanta — Day Party
location: Underground Atlanta, Atlanta, GA
description: Outdoor/indoor day-to-night party under the viaducts — culture, food, music, and crowd energy. Wear comfortable shoes; you'll be moving.

title: Claypool Gold (Les Claypool) at Chastain Park
location: Synovus Bank Amphitheater at Chastain Park, Atlanta, GA
description: Primus/Claypool Lennon Delirium under the stars at Chastain. Picnic, wine, and a show — a perfect Atlanta summer date. Bring a blanket and a date who likes weird bass solos.

title: Salsa at Politan Row — Colony Square
location: Politan Row at Colony Square, 1197 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Sunday salsa + bachata social inside Midtown's food hall. Eat, dance, repeat. Low-key Sunday date with built-in food options.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday — Real Men Cook Vegan (Father's Day Edition)
location: New Life Presbyterian Church, Atlanta, GA
description: Father's Day edition of the beloved Vegan Soul Sunday cookout. Plant-based soul food, community, and good energy. Casual, foodie, family-friendly date — easy win for a relaxed Sunday afternoon.

title: Plant to the Future: Food, Freedom & Black Futures Conference
location: Pittsburgh Yards | The Food Studio, Atlanta, GA
description: Day-long plant-based food conference with chefs, panels, tastings, and a community dinner. Inspiring, educational, and full of good food — ideal for a couple that geeks out on plant-forward culture and Black foodways.

title: Mo Amer at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3073 Donald Lee Hollowell Pkwy NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Mo Amer — the Palestinian-American comedian from 'Mo' on Netflix — brings his warm, observant, deeply funny stand-up to Atlanta. Three nights, easy to pair with dinner on the Westside.

title: Paula Poundstone at Buckhead Theatre
location: Buckhead Theatre, 3110 Roswell Rd, Atlanta, GA
description: A living legend of stand-up — every Poundstone show is a working-class funny date night. Crow-work-heavy, NPR-listener-friendly, and reliably hilarious.

title: Soulful Sips at The Betty
location: The Betty, 374 East Paces Ferry Rd NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Friday-night elevated wine tasting in Buckhead. Dress up a little, slow down, and treat each other.

title: An Evening of Soul — Anthony Hamilton & Musiq Soulchild
location: Mable House Barnes Amphitheatre, Mableton, GA
description: Two neo-soul heavyweights on one bill at an outdoor amphitheatre. Bring a blanket, slow-dance under the trees, sing your lungs out. The romantic date of the summer, no contest.

title: Rahsaan Patterson at City Winery
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Underrated neo-soul/R&B vocalist in an intimate seated venue with dinner and wine service. Built for couples who like their date nights quiet, warm, and a little grown.

title: Vinyl Sessions: June Edition
location: Marcus Bar & Grille, Atlanta, GA
description: Curated vinyl-only listening night — the 12th installment. Intimate, music-nerd-romantic vibe: bring a date who likes talking about albums over drinks. A quieter, more thoughtful date alternative to loud clubs.
